shared_properties: The mirror occupies a clean 16x96 px vertical slab that aligns to the documented grab grid.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while reflective tones stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Frame ornament uses restrained art deco linework so reflected beam readability stays stronger than decoration.
differences: This asset uses a bright central reflective strip, gold perimeter trim, and a dark backplate to communicate plane reflection.
The art is authored in a neutral upright pose because runtime rotation occurs in 15 degree steps.
Top and bottom caps are slightly heavier than the side rails to keep the interactable readable over busy backdrops.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds mirror size, grab movement, and 15 degree rotation control.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the gold-and-shadow material language for tower machinery.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra reach scale so mirror contact feels proportional.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the mirror texture during FloorLoading and register it for MirrorInteractable entities.
runtime_notes: Use Transform rotation in 15 degree steps.
Keep the origin centered for intuitive rotation around the middle.
Render the mirror above the backdrop and below beam overlays.

context.usage: Primary interactable reflector used to bend incoming light beams by the law of reflection.

surface_notes: Top and bottom caps occupy 6 px each.

acceptance_criteria: Mirror texture is exactly 16x96 px and preserves a centered reflective strip across the usable height.
Gold trim remains readable at all allowed rotation angles without overpowering beam readability.
The neutral upright art works cleanly with runtime 15 degree rotation and does not require alternate painted poses.
